channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Epic Fury: The Campaign Against Iran’s Missile & Nuclear Infrastructure
item.description: CSIS's Heather Williams, Tom Karako, and Kari Bingen discuss Operation Epic Fury and its implicatons for U.S. strategic forces.

item.title: From Compliance to Strategy: Rethinking the Role of Human Rights in National Security and Countering Violent Extremism
item.description: Integrating human rights as a core strategy—not merely a compliance requirement—is essential for effective and sustainable CVE efforts, strengthening security, public trust, and safer societies.
